label: Tesla Model S / 3 / X / Y
notes: Tesla does not implement standardized OBD-II / UDS Mode 22 on the diagnostic connector. Battery telemetry is read by passive sniffing of the proprietary vehicle CAN bus on the diagnostic harness behind the centre console (Model 3/Y) or rear seat (Model S/X). Community references: https://github.com/joshwardell/model3dbc , https://github.com/jamiejones85/Tesla-CAN-Bus-Decoder . Implementations should flag Tesla as 'not addressable via standard OBD-II'.

unavailable_fields.all: Standard OBD-II / UDS interface is not provided by Tesla. Use proprietary CAN sniffing instead.
